rows.description: Stipend.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'Stipend.' is a header with no associated monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned amounts from the subsequent entry and misclassified as 'entry'.

rows.description: P.D. Share of M. Peans Fine
rows.notes: Visual verification override. Description 'P.D. Share of M. Peans Fine' (from gemini-flash) is more accurate. Pence whole is 7 (from gpt-5-mini), and the fraction is ¾ (0.75) (from gemini-flash).

rows.description: 22 - Doe’s Bills for Buttery & Kitchin bookin-
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms the pound amount of '5' is negative, indicated by a line above it. gemini-flash correctly captured this and the description. gpt-5-mini missed the negative sign and had a slightly less accurate description.

rows.description: 28 - M. Newbery ½ years Salary for Mich. due Xmas last

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms amounts (55/4/0) and correct interpretation of '3d pr Load' as 3 pence per load, leading to the total. gpt-5-mini misread both amounts and the rate description ('3 s. 1/4 per Load').
